docket_entries.description: RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAGE, DAMENA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY PAGE, DAMENA AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAGE, DAMENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAGE, DAMENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, JAMES JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT V. PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAGE, DAMENA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL 1/05/26. CLAIM AND ORDER MAILED TO J. GUTIERREZ RETURN TO SENDER, UNABLE TO FORWARD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAGE, DAMENA AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, JAMES
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-26-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF DAMENA PAGE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT JAMES GUTIERREZ IS PRESENT. THE ZOOM CONNECTION WITH THE PLAINTIFF HAS TECHNICAL DIFFICULTIES AND THEREFORE THE COURT ALLOWS THE PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR VIA SPEAKER PHONE. THE PLAINTIFF WAIVES ZOOM APPEARANCE TO BE HEARD TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
